title: Little Caesars full nutrition table — sides, wings, dips, thin crust, extras
html:
TL;DR

A near-complete capture of the Little Caesars nutrition PDF — Sides (Crazy Combo, Crazy Bread, Italian/Pepperoni/Zesty Cheese Bread, Stuffed Crazy Bread, Cookie Dough Brownies w/ M&M's and Twix), Caesar Wings (Oven Roasted, Buffalo, BBQ, Garlic Parmesan), the full dip lineup (Cheezy Jalapeño, Ranch, Buffalo Ranch, Butter Garlic, Cheddar), Thin Crust Pepperoni/Cheese, Stuffed Crust add-ons, and Zap Pack / Parmesan packet extras. Every column is here: calories, fat-from-cal, total fat, sat fat, trans, cholesterol, sodium, carbs, fiber, sugars, protein, plus allergen flags (Egg/Milk/Wheat/Soy).

Why it's in the graph

This is one of ~7 fast-food nutrition screenshots Yahir grabbed in a 4 a.m. burst on July 17–18 2025 — the Brotein / BroMenu dataset-bootstrapping run. The pattern across the cluster: he was scraping the corporate nutrition PDFs of every chain he wanted anabolic scoring to cover, almost certainly to seed the Supabase menu_items table seen in 2025 07 09 screenshot 2025 07 09 at 4 51 29 pm 720cb8bf.

Little Caesars is a low-protein, high-sodium chain — likely a "trap" entry in the BroMenu ranking (most items will score badly on the anabolic scoring axis). Useful as the negative example for the app's "Slow down, bro!" copy.

What's actually on the page

  • Sides (8 items): Crazy Combo / Crazy Bread (840/800 cal); cheese breads ~1340–1520 cal at ~150g+ carbs.
  • Cookie Dough Brownies with M&M's MINIS / Twix / Cookie Bar Pieces — one-package calorie counts.
  • Caesar Wings (4 flavors): Oven Roasted, Buffalo, BBQ, Garlic Parmesan — all in the 510–620 cal range, ~30+g fat.
  • Caesar Dips (5): Cheezy Jalapeño, Ranch, Buffalo Ranch, Butter Garlic, Cheddar.
  • Thin Crust Pepperoni (2130 cal/whole) and Cheese (1980 cal/whole) — and the Make It Stuffed Crust add-on for round + Detroit-style.
  • Extras: Zap Pack, Parmesan Cheese Packet.
  • Macro grid + allergen matrix (Egg/Milk/Wheat/Soy/Other).

Loose ends

  • Need to confirm whether the anabolic scoring formula penalizes sodium directly or just on a derived "bro-fitness" axis — Little Caesars sodium is brutal (3330 mg on a Stuffed Crazy Bread).
  • Pizza menu (rounds, Detroit-Style, ExtraMostBestest) isn't in this screenshot — probably captured separately or the OCR cut off.
  • Worth checking if the BroMenu camera-scan mode would match these item names verbatim or if a fuzzy-match table is needed.

  • brotein / bromenu

  • supabase

  • 2025 07 09 screenshot 2025 07 09 at 4 51 29 pm 720cb8bf — the Supabase table this data fed into
